name: Human Empire
description: The ruling human power that won the 5000-year war, enslaving demi-humans and once allied with demons.

name: Demi-Human Remnants
description: Scattered communities of elves, dwarves, and other demi-humans living as slaves or hidden refugees.

name: Village Adventurer Guild
description: Local guild near Blue's village that manages dungeon quotas and overflow cleanup.

name: Skyward Adventurer Guild
description: Prestigious guild controlling exploration of the Skyward Tower and ranking rising adventurers like Blue.

name: Ironroot Smiths
description: Dwarven-rooted smithing lineage tied to Rurik and ancient blacksmith traditions.

name: Elf Kingdom
description: Formerly proud elven royal kingdom, now under heavy pressure or indirect control from the Human Empire. Holds Elaria as an oath-bound prisoner of the Elf King.
